config.script:
#include "50518" #include "50560" #include "50561"
#ifdef _OBSOLETE_JUST_FOR_PATTERN_ dim accessWHERE:accessWHERE=CStr("") dim pAccessUtilPage if (pPage.roottypeid=CLng(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE)) then set pAccessUtilPage=doc_.getmodule(60106) accessWHERE = pAccessUtilPage.GetWHERE_ForCheckRights(STDR_READ,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"n5zadanie",trans_.var(GVAR_USER) ) end if if (pPage.roottypeid=CLng(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT)) then set pAccessUtilPage=doc_.getmodule(60106) accessWHERE = pAccessUtilPage.GetWHERE_ForCheckRights(STDR_READ,TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,"n5dokument",trans_.var(GVAR_USER) ) end if if (pPage.roottypeid=CLng(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE)) then set pAccessUtilPage=doc_.getmodule(60106) accessWHERE = pAccessUtilPage.GetWHERE_ForCheckRights(STDR_READ,TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,"SearchType",trans_.var(GVAR_USER) ) end if if (pPage.roottypeid=CLng(TYPEID_CHOICELIST)) then set pAccessUtilPage=doc_.getmodule(60106) accessWHERE = pAccessUtilPage.GetWHERE_ForCheckRights(STDR_READ,TYPEID_CHOICELIST,"choicelist",trans_.var(GVAR_USER) ) end if #endif '------------------------------------------------------------------ ' NX Generation '------------------------------------------------------------------ ' ' Funkcja obcina pierwsze słowo "JOIN" (jeśli istnieje). Zwraca obciętą wersję ' Przydatna jest przy funkcji trans_.createrawcursor(). ' '--------------------------------------------------------------------------
function trim_first_join(byval strJoin) dim s : s = LTrim(strJoin)
'-------------------------------------- ' dodatkowo obetnij przedrostki if UCase(Left(s, 5))="LEFT " then s = LTrim(Mid(s, 6)) end if
if UCase(Left(s, 6))="RIGHT " then s = LTrim(Mid(s, 7)) end if
if UCase(Left(s, 6))="OUTER " then s = LTrim(Mid(s, 7)) end if
if UCase(Left(s, 6))="INNER " then s = LTrim(Mid(s, 7)) end if
'---------------------------------------
if UCase(Left(s, 5))="JOIN " then s = Mid(s, 6) end if trim_first_join = s end function
dim g_strAdditionalWhere 'Dodatkowy where
function fopen() g_strAdditionalWhere = "" end function
function addAdditionalWhere(byval strNewAdditionalWhere) g_strAdditionalWhere = strNewAdditionalWhere end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' glowna procedura tworzaca parametr raportu / szukania na podstawie bindingu '------------------------------------------------------------------ function nx_create_param_on_binding(byref oBinding,byref oRPF) dim oMultiChoiceParam
with oBinding select case .compare_field_info.sqltype case SQLcurrency,SQLqty set nx_create_param_on_binding = oRPF.new_currency(.compare_field_info, .compare_expression, _ .binding_expression,.compare_condition,"",2) case SQLdate set nx_create_param_on_binding = oRPF.new_date_range(.compare_field_info,.compare_expression, _ .binding_expression,.compare_condition,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) case SQLlong if .compare_field_info.reltype = RELT_ENUM then set oMultiChoiceParam = oRPF.new_multichoice(.compare_field_info,.compare_expression, _ .binding_expression,.compare_condition) nx_init_choice_param_on_enum oMultiChoiceParam, _ .compare_field_info.parent.typeid, .compare_field_info.name set nx_create_param_on_binding = oMultiChoiceParam else set nx_create_param_on_binding = oRPF.new_int(.compare_field_info,.compare_expression, _ .binding_expression,.compare_condition) end if case SQLtime set nx_create_param_on_binding = oRPF.new_time(.compare_field_info,.compare_expression, _ .binding_expression,.compare_condition) case else dim strCompCondWhere : strCompCondWhere = "" if trim( .compare_condition) <> "" then strCompCondWhere = " where " + replace(.compare_condition,"{0}",.compare_field_info.parent.table_name) end if dim oRSCount : set oRSCount = trans_.createadors("select count(*) from " + _ .compare_field_info.parent.table_name + strCompCondWhere) if clng(oRSCount(0)) < 30 then
'compare_expression = idobj - ma specjalne znaczenie optymalizujace
set oMultiChoiceParam = oRPF.new_multichoice(.compare_field_info, "idobj", _ .binding_expression,.compare_condition) oMultiChoiceParam.init_on_cursor _ trans_.createadors("select " + .compare_expression + ",idobj from " + _ .compare_field_info.parent.table_name + strCompCondWhere +_ " order by " + .compare_expression + ",idobj") set nx_create_param_on_binding = oMultiChoiceParam else set nx_create_param_on_binding = oRPF.new_text(.compare_field_info, .compare_expression, _ .binding_expression,.compare_condition) end if end select end with end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment 'buduje tablice parametrow raportu na podstawie RapDef #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ function nx_build_param_array_on_rapdef(byref oNXArray,byref oNXRapDef) dim oRPF : set oRPF = nx_.new_param_factory() dim oFilter
for each oFilter in oNXRapDef.filters dim oBinding for each oBinding in oFilter.bindings dim oParam : set oParam = nx_create_param_on_binding(oBinding,oRPF) if not oParam is nothing then oNXArray.add oParam end if next next end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment 'buduje tablice parametrow raportu na podstawie tablicy bindings #comment ' #comment 'dostaje tablice Bindings, zwraca tablice RaportParam! #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ function nx_build_param_array_on_binding_array(byref oBindingNXArray,byref oRPF) set nx_build_param_array_on_binding_array = nothing
dim oParamNXArray : set oParamNXArray = nx_.new_array() dim oBinding for each oBinding in oBindingNXArray dim oParam : set oParam = nx_create_param_on_binding(oBinding,oRPF) if not oParam is nothing then oParamNXArray.add oParam end if next
set nx_build_param_array_on_binding_array = oParamNXArray end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ function nx_lookup_raport_definition(byval iTypeId,byval strFixedNamePart) set nx_lookup_raport_definition = nothing dim strName : strName = strFixedNamePart + cstr(iTypeId) + "@" 'search user defined first dim idSearchType : idSearchType = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,"Nazwa='" + strName + "' and ResultTypeId=" + cstr(iTypeId)) if idSearchType <= 0 then 'search repository set nx_lookup_raport_definition = nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(iTypeId) _ .raports.get_raport_by_name(strName) exit function end if dim pSearchObj : set pSearchObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,idSearchType) if pSearchObj is nothing then exit function end if set nx_lookup_raport_definition = nx_load_raport_definition(pSearchObj) end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment 'tworzy strumien z XML strony z kontrolkami do wyswietlenia dialogu #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ function nx_build_param_dialog_page(byref oNXArray,byval strTitle,byref pSO,byval iTemplate) trans_.var(100) = strTitle
set pSO = asp_form_stream(iTemplate,0,oNXArray) end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' create nx_ raport definition on search type #comment '------------------------------------------------------- function nx_load_raport_definition(byref pSearchObj) dim oRapDef : set oRapDef = nx_.new_rapdef(pSearchObj.ResultTypeId,pSearchObj.Nazwa)
oRapDef.title = pSearchObj.Nazwa
dim oNXPath dim oFilter for each oFilter in pSearchObj.listFilter set oNXPath = nx_.load_fp_node_path(oFilter.ComposedPath) oRapDef.addfltr oNXPath next dim oOrder for each oOrder in pSearchObj.listOrder set oNXPath = nx_.load_fp_node_path(oOrder.ComposedPath) oRapDef.addordr oNXPath,(oOrder.cLink = "1"),(oOrder.cGroup = "1"),(oOrder.cDesc = "0") next dim oColumn for each oColumn in pSearchObj.listColumn set oNXPath = nx_.load_fp_node_path(oColumn.ComposedPath) oRapDef.addcol oNXPath,(oColumn.cLink = "1"), (oColumn.cGroup = "1") next
set nx_load_raport_definition = oRapDef end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------ ' wyswietla dialog z parametrami ' 0 - rezygnacja ' 1 - 1-szy button ' 2 - 2-gi button itd. '------------------------------------------------------------------ function nx_display_param_dialog(byref oNXArray,byref pSO,byval iAutoAnswer) nx_display_param_dialog = iAutoAnswer
dim iter dim bShowDialog : bShowDialog = false dim pParam for each pParam in oNXArray if not pParam.autoanswer then bShowDialog = true exit for end if next
if bShowDialog then dim pOpenHLI : set pOpenHLI = doc_.createhli() set pOpenHLI.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE) = pSO pOpenHLI.prop(GVAR_CMD) = clng(CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE) dim pDialogPage : set pDialogPage = doc_.getpagehli(pOpenHLI) pDialogPage.init_on_params oNXArray dim iResult : iResult = pDialogPage.domodalauto() if iResult = 0 then nx_display_param_dialog = 0 exit function end if pDialogPage.update_params oNXArray
set pDialogPage = nothing nx_display_param_dialog = iResult end if end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment ' wstawienie do query wartosci aktualnych z parametru dialogu #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ function nx_update_query_with_param(byref oNXArray,byval strQuery) dim pParam dim oFormatter : set oFormatter = trans_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQuery) for each pParam in oNXArray oFormatter.add pParam.build_where_part() next nx_update_query_with_param = oFormatter.done() end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment '(toplevel) odpytanie uzytkownika o wartosci parametrow #comment ' podmienia dostarczony strWhere (in/out) #comment ' #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ function nx_acquire_parameters_ui(byref oNXParamArray,byval strDialogTitle, _ byval iPageTemplate,byref strWhere) nx_acquire_parameters_ui = 0
dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() nx_build_param_dialog_page oNXParamArray,strDialogTitle,pSO,iPageTemplate dim iResult : iResult = nx_display_param_dialog(oNXParamArray,pSO,2) if iResult = 0 then exit function else strWhere = nx_update_query_with_param(oNXParamArray,strWhere) end if nx_acquire_parameters_ui = iResult end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment 'klasa wspomagajaca tworzenie dialogow z raportami #comment 'dodajemy kolejne bindings, a potem tylko wolamy dialog #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ class nx_dialog_param_helper private m_oNXRapParamFactory private m_nBindingNXArray private m_iTemplate
private sub class_initialize() set m_oNXRapParamFactory = nx_.new_param_factory() set m_nBindingNXArray = nx_.new_array() m_iTemplate = 20250 end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_nBindingNXArray = nothing set m_oNXRapParamFactory = nothing end sub
public sub add_binding(byval iTypeId,byval strFieldName, _ byval strCompareExpression,byval strBindingExpression, _ byval strCompareCondition)
dim oBinding : set oBinding = m_oNXRapParamFactory.new_binding( _ iTypeId,strFieldName,strCompareExpression, _ strBindingExpression,strCompareCondition)
m_nBindingNXArray.add oBinding end sub
public sub add_simple_binding(byval iTypeId,byval strFieldName, _ byval strCompareExpression) add_binding iTypeId,strFieldName,strCompareExpression,"idobj","" end sub
public property let id_dialog_template(byval iTemplate) m_iTemplate = iTemplate end property
public function build_param_array() set build_param_array = _ nx_build_param_array_on_binding_array(m_nBindingNXArray,m_oNXRapParamFactory) end function
public function acquire_parameters_ui(byval strTitle,byref strQuery) dim oParamNXArray : set oParamNXArray = build_param_array() acquire_parameters_ui = nx_acquire_parameters_ui(oParamNXArray,strTitle,m_iTemplate,strQuery) end function end class
function new_nx_dialog_param_helper() set new_nx_dialog_param_helper = new nx_dialog_param_helper end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------ function std_search(byref pPage) : std_search = false '--------------------------------------------------- ' poczatek fragmentu ktory mozna przeniesc do osobnej funkcji ' 'wybierz sposob szyukania, odpytaj param i zwroc sqlquery '--------------------------------------------------- dim trans : set trans = trans_.createsubtran() trans_.var(APPVAR_SEARCH_TYPEID) = pPage.root.type trans_.var(APPVAR_SEARCH_KIND) = "S"
'wybierz odpowiedni sposób wyszukiwania dim idChoice : idChoice = nx_fire_choice_list( TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE, "Wybór sposobu szukania","ResultTypeId=" + cstr(pPage.root.type) + " and cKind='S' ","") if idChoice = 0 then exit function end if dim pSearchObj:set pSearchObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE, idChoice) if pSearchObj is nothing then exit function end if
dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = nx_.new_array() dim oNXRapDef : set oNXRapDef = nx_load_raport_definition(pSearchObj)
dim oSQLQuery : set oSQLQuery = oNXRapDef.create_query(nx_.apprep,0) '0=qf_for_raport_obj dim strWhere : strWhere = oSQLQuery.get_sql_where() if g_strAdditionalWhere <> "" then if strWhere = "" then strWhere = g_strAdditionalWhere else strWhere = strWhere + " and " + g_strAdditionalWhere end if end if
#ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 0,0,oSQLQuery.get_sql() #endif
nx_build_param_array_on_rapdef oNXArray,oNXRapDef
dim iResult : iResult = nx_acquire_parameters_ui(oNXArray,oNXRapDef.title,20217,strWhere) if iResult = 0 then exit function end if
set pSearchObj = nothing set trans = nothing '--------------------------------------------------- ' koniec fragmentu ktory mozna przeniesc do osobnej funkcji '--------------------------------------------------- ' kod pozostajacy w std_search -> wykorzystanie wynikow z w/w funkcji '---------------------------------------------------
dim strTableName : strTableName = pPage.root.getobjdef.Tablename dim strJoin : strJoin = oSQLQuery.get_sql_joins() dim pCursor: set pCursor = trans_.createrawcursor(pPage.roottypeid, _ strWhere, oSQLQuery.get_sql_orders(), trim_first_join(strJoin)) pCursor.forwardonly = false set pPage.cursoriter = pCursor.createiterator
if iResult = 1 then 'show list dim strWhereForCL strWhereForCL = strTableName + ".idobj in (select " + strTableName + ".idobj from " +_ strTableName + strJoin if strWhere <> "" then strWhereForCL = strWhereForCL + " where " + strWhere end if strWhereForCL = strWhereForCL + ")"
dim iChoice : iChoice = nx_fire_choice_list( pPage.roottypeid,"Wybrane rekordy",strWhereForCL,"") if iChoice <> 0 then dim pChoosenObj:set pChoosenObj = trans_.getobj(pPage.roottypeid, iChoice)
if pPage.root.isnew() then pPage.root.ignore = true end if
'Ustawiamy odpowiedni obiekt set pPage.root = pChoosenObj trans_.discard end if else #ifdef UTWORZ_LISTE_WYBORU_Z_SELEKCJI '------------------- tworzenie listy wyboru -------------- dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa tworzenie listy ...") dim oElementNXArray : set oElementNXArray = nx_.new_array() dim oItem for each oItem in pCursor oElementNXArray.add oItem.idobj next
trans_.var(APPVAR_CHOICELIST_TYPEID) = pPage.roottypeid dim pOpenSORFormHLI : set pOpenSORFormHLI = doc_.getmodule(60129).prepare_form_open_command(TYPEID_CHOICELIST,0,USAGE_EDIT) if not pOpenSORFormHLI is nothing then dim pSORPage : set pSORPage = doc_.getpagehli(pOpenSORFormHLI) dim idElement for each idElement in oElementNXArray pSORPage.root.listElement.addnew().idElement = idElement next set pPerf = nothing pSORPage.domodalauto end if '------------------- #endif pPage.ffirst end if
std_search = true end function
